subtitle.message: Please sign in to access the ERP system.

accountSecurity.title: Account security
accountSecurity.subtitle: Update your sign-in email, password, or permanently delete your account.
accountSecurity.signed_out: Sign in to manage your account.

email.heading: Email address
email.success: Check your current inbox to approve the change, then verify the new address.
email.invalid: Enter a new email that differs from your current address.
email.help: We email your current address to approve the change, then send verification to the new address.

password.heading: Password
password.revoke_others: Sign out other sessions after change
password.required: Enter your current and new password.

apiKeys.heading: API keys
apiKeys.body: Programmatic access uses Better Auth API keys when enabled for your workspace. Create and revoke keys from your organization or admin settings when available.
apiKeys.hint: Requires the full auth stack (`AFENDA_AUTH_ALL_PLUGINS` not false) and the API key plugin on the server.

delete.heading: Delete account
delete.warning: This permanently removes your sign-in and app access. Some workspace data may be retained under governance policies.
delete.password_help_oauth: If you use Google or another provider only, leave this empty — we will email a confirmation link.
delete.oauth_only: We will email a confirmation link to your address on file.
delete.ack: I understand this account will be permanently deleted.
delete.success: If a confirmation email was required, check your inbox and open the link. Otherwise your session has ended.
delete.need_ack: Confirm that you understand permanent deletion.
